rules.label: possible_task
rules.rationale: Action language paired with a date/time entity likely represents a task.

rules.label: possible_event
rules.rationale: Event-oriented phrases or date/time entities indicate a possible event.

rules.label: reminder_candidate
rules.rationale: Follow-up language with scheduling/contact signals suggests a reminder candidate.

rules.label: idea
rules.rationale: Idea language without action intent maps to idea classification.

rules.label: journal_entry
rules.rationale: Reflective first-person language indicates journaling content.

rules.label: high_revisit_value
rules.rationale: Frequently revisited notes may deserve easier access.

rules.label: merge_candidate
rules.rationale: Strong textual/topic overlap suggests merge consideration.
